decisions.title: Concerns about performance
decisions.detail: There are concerns regarding the current performance of the dashboard project.

evidence.quote: there are some concerns about performance.

decisions.title: Need for a better database
decisions.detail: There is a suggestion that a better database should probably be used at some point for the project.

evidence.quote: Someone mentioned we should probably use a better database at some point.

decisions.title: UI aesthetic improvement required
decisions.detail: The User Interface needs to be aesthetically improved.

evidence.quote: The UI needs to look nicer.

decisions.title: Current UI design deemed inadequate
decisions.detail: There was a consensus that the current design of the UI is not satisfactory.

evidence.quote: We all agreed the current design isn't great.

decisions.title: Timelines are undecided
decisions.detail: Despite discussion about timelines, no firm decisions were made.

evidence.quote: There was a discussion about timelines but nothing was firmly decided.

decisions.title: CRM system integration is uncertain
decisions.detail: Potential integration with the CRM system is foreseen, but the timing and method are currently unknown.

evidence.quote: We might need to integrate with the CRM system eventually, but we're not sure when or how.

decisions.title: Budget is a concern
decisions.detail: Budget was identified as a concern, although no specific numbers were discussed.

evidence.quote: Budget was mentioned briefly — it's a concern but no numbers were shared.

decisions.title: Testing needs to be more thorough
decisions.detail: The team lead suggested that the testing process should be more comprehensive.

evidence.quote: The team lead hinted that testing should be more thorough.

decisions.title: Improved documentation required
decisions.detail: It was suggested that documentation practices should improve going forward.

evidence.quote: We should probably document things better going forward.

implementation_scope: Refactor and redesign existing dashboard UI components to meet new aesthetic requirements.
Enhance and expand test coverage and testing processes for the project (inferred_needs_confirmation).

constraints.text: Address existing performance concerns for the dashboard project.
Budget limitations are a concern (no specific numbers shared).

open_technical_questions: Evaluate and decide on a 'better' database solution for the project (inferred_needs_confirmation).

acceptance_criteria: Given an approved UI design specification, When the dashboard project is displayed, Then all UI components and layouts visually conform to the specified design.
test_scenarios: Visually inspect the dashboard UI to confirm it matches the newly approved design mockups.
Verify the dashboard UI renders correctly and consistently across all supported desktop web browsers.
Verify the dashboard UI renders correctly and consistently across all supported mobile devices or responsive browser views.
edge_cases: Test the dashboard UI rendering on minimum supported screen resolutions to ensure no layout breaks or element overlaps.
Test the dashboard UI rendering on maximum supported screen resolutions to ensure optimal use of space and consistent aesthetics.
Verify UI elements maintain aesthetic consistency and readability when browser zoom levels are increased or decreased within reasonable bounds.
unresolved_behaviors: What is the approved UI design specification, including mockups and style guides, that the aesthetic improvements should be validated against?
What are the specific, measurable performance metrics (e.g., page load times, data refresh rates, concurrent user capacity) that need to be achieved to address the identified performance concerns?

What does 'more thorough' testing entail? Are there specific test types (e.g., accessibility, security, localization), coverage targets, or new test processes that need to be implemented to achieve this?

decision_history: It was confirmed that the User Interface needs to be aesthetically improved.
There was a consensus that the current UI design is not satisfactory, necessitating aesthetic improvements.
dependencies: Potential integration with the CRM system (inferred, timing and method need to be confirmed with the CRM team).
risks: Performance concerns: There are confirmed concerns regarding the current performance of the dashboard project (Impact: High, Likelihood: Confirmed).
Budget concerns: Budget was identified as a concern, though no specific numbers or detailed impact assessment were discussed (Impact: Potentially High, Likelihood: Confirmed).

Technical Debt/Performance Risk: A suggestion for a better database was made, if the current database is indeed inadequate, it poses a risk to long-term performance and scalability (Impact: High, Likelihood: Unknown, pending confirmation).
alignment_gaps: Timelines are completely undecided: Despite discussion, no firm decisions or commitments were made regarding project timelines and key delivery dates, which indicates a significant gap in planning and stakeholder alignment.

Unconfirmed Requirements: The need for a better database, more thorough testing, and improved documentation are currently inferred suggestions needing formal confirmation as requirements or process changes, which could lead to rework if not addressed early.
open_questions: What are the confirmed project timelines, key milestones, and deadlines for the dashboard project? (Owned by PM)
Is a better database required for the project? If so, what are the specific requirements and estimated timeline for this change? (Owned by PM/QA to confirm requirement)

What does 'more thorough' testing entail, and is the team lead's suggestion for comprehensive testing a confirmed requirement for this project? What are the new acceptance criteria for testing? (Owned by PM/QA)
What are the requirements for integrating with the CRM system, including scope, timing, and method? (Owned by PM/QA for scope and timing)
Should documentation practices be improved, and if so, what specific standards or processes are required to achieve this? (Owned by PM/QA to define process requirements)

system_requirements: The system UI SHALL be aesthetically improved. (D003)
The system SHALL meet defined performance targets (inferred - needs confirmation of specific targets). (D001)
The system SHALL be subject to a comprehensive testing process (inferred - needs confirmation). (D008)
data_flows: Anticipated data flow between the current system/dashboard and a CRM system. Direction and specific data elements are currently undefined. (D006)
interface_contracts: An interface contract for CRM system integration SHALL be formally defined upon clarification of integration requirements (inferred - needs confirmation). (D006)

constraints.text: The system MUST address current performance concerns, requiring a strategy to meet improved performance metrics. (D001)
The project MUST operate within identified budget constraints. (D007)

architectural_decisions.text: The current UI design is deemed unsatisfactory and requires a comprehensive redesign and implementation of new aesthetics. (D004)
An improved database solution SHALL be adopted for the project (inferred - needs confirmation of specific technology). (D002)
Improved documentation practices SHALL be implemented for the project (inferred - needs confirmation). (D009)

open_analysis_questions: What are the specific performance metrics and targets (e.g., response time, throughput, concurrency) that the dashboard project must achieve? (D001)
What is the scope, method (e.g., API, file transfer, direct DB access), and timing for potential integration with the CRM system? (D006)
If an improved database is adopted (D002), what specific database technology will be used, and what is the strategy for data migration and integration?

stakeholder.business_summary: The team met to address critical areas for the dashboard project, focusing on improving its overall performance and user experience. We identified that the current design is not satisfactory and raised concerns about the project's performance and budget. Several key technical decisions and project timelines still need your official alignment before we can move forward effectively.
key_impact: Users will benefit from a faster, more visually appealing dashboard that is easier to use.
The project faces risks related to budget constraints and current performance issues, which could affect user satisfaction and project delivery.
The team requires clear direction on key technical choices and timelines to ensure efficient progress and avoid delays.
A dedicated redesign of the user interface is necessary to meet user expectations and business standards.
decisions_needing_alignment: Confirm if we should proceed with upgrading to a more robust database system for the project.
Approve the recommendation to conduct more thorough testing to ensure the highest quality of the dashboard.
Agree on the need to improve internal documentation practices for better project maintainability going forward.
major_unresolved_questions: What are the definitive timelines for implementing the necessary dashboard improvements?
What is the estimated budget impact of all proposed changes, including design improvements and performance enhancements?
Will the dashboard need to integrate with our Customer Relationship Management (CRM) system, and if so, what is the priority and method?

review.reviewer_notes: All role outputs accurately reflect the extracted decisions. Inferred items are consistently flagged for confirmation across views. No hallucinations, quality issues, or sensitive content/prompt injections were detected. The report is ready for publication.

evidence_quotes: there are some concerns about performance.
Someone mentioned we should probably use a better database at some point.
The UI needs to look nicer.
We all agreed the current design isn't great.
There was a discussion about timelines but nothing was firmly decided.
We might need to integrate with the CRM system eventually, but we're not sure when or how.
Budget was mentioned briefly — it's a concern but no numbers were shared.
